heading: Record
label: 392 Record
notes: Effective DateSection applicable with respect to any general or special election for Representative in, or Resident Commissioner to, the Congress of the United States occurring after , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 5, 1969section 19 of Pub. L. 91–138section 381 of this title

children.heading: Hearing on papers, depositions, and exhibits
children.label: a Hearing on papers, depositions, and exhibits
children.text: Contested election cases shall be heard by the committee on the papers, depositions, and exhibits filed with the Clerk. Such papers, depositions, and exhibits shall constitute the record of the case.

children.heading: Appendix to contestant’s brief
children.label: b Appendix to contestant’s brief
children.text: Contestant shall print as an appendix to his brief those portions of the record which he desires the committee to consider in order to decide the case and such other portions of the record as may be prescribed by the rules of the committee.

children.heading: Appendix to contestee’s brief
children.label: c Appendix to contestee’s brief
children.text: Contestee shall print as an appendix to his brief those portions of the record not printed by contestant which contestee desires the committee to consider in order to decide the case.

children.heading: Contestant’s brief; service on contestee
children.label: d Contestant’s brief; service on contestee
children.text: Within forty-five days after the time for both parties to take testimony has expired, contestant shall serve on contestee his printed brief of the facts and authorities relied on to establish his case together with his appendix.

children.heading: Contestee’s brief; service on contestant
children.label: e Contestee’s brief; service on contestant
children.text: Within thirty days of service of contestant’s brief and appendix, contestee shall serve on contestant his printed brief of the facts and authorities relied on to establish his case together with his appendix.

children.heading: Reply brief of contestant
children.label: f Reply brief of contestant
children.text: Within ten days after service of contestee’s brief and appendix, contestant may serve on contestee a printed reply brief.

children.heading: Form of briefs; number of copies served and filed
children.label: g Form of briefs; number of copies served and filed
children.text: The form and length of the briefs, the form of the appendixes, and the number of copies to be served and filed shall be in accordance with such rules as the committee may prescribe.
